description:
Recto: Notes for drawing up a legal document. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe? The two sides (al-ḍiddayn) are Hiba b. Khalaf and the teacher Abū Kathīr. A period of one year is mentioned. 

Verso: Note probably addressed to a judge or notary Abū Saʿ[d or Saʿīd] instructing him to draw up a document (yaktub ḥujja) for a case concerning the "girl" (slave?) of Hiba. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
